description: The TC must confirm that the buyer has deposited the earnest money with escrow by the contractual deadline.

nodes.task_description: Check the transaction timeline for the earnest money deposit deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that the deadline is within 3 days of acceptance.

nodes.task_description: Contact the escrow officer to confirm receipt of the deposit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates with the escrow officer who confirms the funds have been received.

nodes.task_description: Upload the receipt of deposit to the transaction file and mark the contingency as complete.

expected_outcome.expected: The TC uploads the receipt document and updates the checklist in the transaction system.
